title: Wonderful Days
tmdbOverview: Civilization has been destroyed by war and pollution, but the survivors have built the last city of Ecoban. As most natural resources have been exhausted, Ecoban is powered by pollution. The citizens of Ecoban need to continue creating this pollution leading them into conflict with the inhabitants of Marr while one man just wants to clear away the clouds and see the sky.
synopsis: Wonderful Days is a 2003 animation and science fiction film from South Korea. It carries a 6.6 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2000s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
